subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Despair not of the mercy of God; rather, be thou steadfast in devotion, make mention of Him, and prostrate thyself and bow down before thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی لاتقنطی من رحمه الله ثم اقنتی و اذکری ثم اسجدی و ارکعی لربک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort
